author: doll-agent
content:
Done. Added ferray-ufunc/src/errstate.rs with numpy's errstate/seterr API.

Types: FpErrorClass (DivideByZero/Overflow/Underflow/Invalid), FpErrorState (Ignore/Warn/Raise).
API: seterr/geterr (per-class policy mutators), with_errstate (RAII scope guard, panic-safe), record_fp_event (kernels call this), take_fp_events (drain Warn log), check_fp_errors (return Err for queued Raise).

Per-thread state via thread_local. Default policies match numpy: invalid=Warn, others=Ignore.

Module docstring is explicit about the per-kernel integration gap (kernels don't yet call record_fp_event - that's follow-up).

7 tests covering defaults, seterr round-trip, all three policies, scoped overrides, panic-safe restoration. 7 new tests, all passing, clippy clean. Commit 8eb12f07.
